use_cases: Landing page hero section with animated orbiting profile images or brand icons
Portfolio showcase introducing team members or featured projects
Product feature highlights with circular animated item displays
Creative agency intro with spinning brand elements
ai_summary: A radial animated intro component featuring orbiting items that continuously spin around a central stage, using spring physics for smooth lift-in animations and rotation effects. The component accepts custom orbit items with images, configurable stage and image sizes, and delivers an engaging visual entrance perfect for hero sections.
